size-deep.text: A deep room. The ceiling is high above you.

size-vast.text: A vast cavern. Your steps echo for seconds.

size-impossibly-deep.text: An impossibly deep chamber. The dark feels alive.

landmark-drip.text: You hear water dripping rhythmically from the ceiling.

landmark-wind.text: You hear wind moving through unseen passages.

landmark-hum.text: You hear a low resonant hum from the stone walls.

landmark-chime.text: You hear a faint metallic chime, source unknown.

landmark-echo.text: You hear an unusually long echo. This chamber is huge.

exit-room.text: A wide chamber, far from the entrance. The air feels different here. This is the exit.

base-room.text: You stand at the cave mouth. This is your base. Inventory and items are safe here.

crossover-room.text: A crossover passage joins another part of the cave here.

chamber-large.text: The chamber is large. Your steps echo.

lore-classic-first-step.text: First step off the threshold. The air shifts — heavier, mineral. Behind me the cave entrance dims; ahead, a low room exhales cool breath.

lore-grotto-first-step.text: First step into the grotto. The floor is glass-smooth, dusted with crystal grit. Each footfall rings faintly, as if the stone itself is listening.

lore-classic-drip.text: A slow drip pools somewhere in the dark. The drops fall on a perfect rhythm, older than I am, older than anyone.

lore-grotto-drip.text: Mineral water beads from the ceiling and pings into a still pool. Each drop sounds like a distant chime, perfectly tuned to the room.

lore-classic-wind.text: Wind threads through this passage from a gap I cannot find. It carries the smell of wet earth and something faintly burnt.

lore-grotto-wind.text: A thin draft moves through here, making the crystals along the walls hum at the edge of hearing — a cathedral whispering to itself.

lore-classic-hum.text: The whole room hums. Set my hand against the wall and the stone vibrates against my palm, low and patient.

lore-grotto-hum.text: The grotto resonates here. Strike one finger against the wall and the harmonic answers from every direction at once.

lore-classic-chime.text: Crystals along the ceiling chime when sound passes them. My breath alone wakes a chord; I stop, just to listen to the silence after.

lore-grotto-chime.text: Forest of slender crystals, struck by the passing air. Each one rings a different note — together they map the room better than any light could.

lore-classic-echo.text: I clap once and the echo returns nine times, each fainter than the last, each from a different wall. This room is bigger than I thought.

lore-grotto-echo.text: Vast chamber. My voice circles back to me changed, as if the grotto itself is repeating my words back to teach me their shape.

lore-classic-exit.text: Found it. A seam of grey light along the wall, and beyond, the wider cave. Side passages I did not see before are settling open behind me.

lore-grotto-exit.text: Found the way through. Beyond, the grotto opens into something far larger, and along the walls the side passages I missed begin to glow faintly — they were always here.

lore-classic-crossover.text: A passage I had not noticed loops back to a room I already know. The cave was quietly folding itself the whole time.

lore-grotto-crossover.text: A crystal arch arcs back to a chamber I'd already mapped. The grotto is not a tree but a lattice — every path eventually meets another.

lore-classic-deep.text: Depth eight. The air tastes like cold iron. I have not seen daylight in a long while.

lore-grotto-deep.text: Depth eight. The crystals here are larger, slower-pulsing — older, perhaps. I feel watched, but kindly.

lore-classic-explorer.text: Mapped every room. The cave has no more secrets to keep from me — only its silence, which is its own kind of answer.

lore-grotto-explorer.text: Every chamber accounted for. The grotto rings, faintly, as if pleased to have been understood.

lore-classic-all-landmarks.text: Drip, wind, hum, chime, echo. Five voices of the cave. I have stood in each. They are not separate rooms; they are a chord.

lore-grotto-all-landmarks.text: All five voices heard. The grotto sang a chord I will not forget — drip, wind, hum, chime, echo, like five colors of one light.

descent-classic-1.text: The exit was not the surface. It was a threshold. The cave continues, larger now, the air a few degrees colder.

descent-classic-2.text: Through. The new cave hums on a lower note than the last. I keep moving — the entrance behind me is already a memory.

descent-classic-3.text: Another floor. The walls are wider here. Whatever made this place was patient.

descent-classic-4.text: Down again. I hear the same drips, but slower, as if the water has further to fall.

descent-classic-5.text: Each cave opens into the next. I no longer think of going back.

descent-grotto-1.text: The grotto was not the bottom. Below, larger crystal halls — they ring at lower frequencies, almost subaudible.

descent-grotto-2.text: Through. The new chamber is colder, the crystals here older and slower-pulsing.

descent-grotto-3.text: Another lattice. The geometry is the same and not the same — like a chord transposed down a step.

descent-grotto-4.text: I cross another threshold. The grotto's song shifts down an octave; I follow it.

descent-grotto-5.text: Each grotto opens into a deeper one. The light from the crystals has gone almost violet.

step-in-passage.text: Step into any open passage to begin.

swipe-tap.text: Swipe to move, tap to listen.

stage1-mainvein.text: Stage 1: follow the main vein to find the exit.

cannot-beacon-base.text: Cannot drop a beacon at base.

reach-exit-first.text: Reach the exit before descending. Stage 1 first.

no-loot.text: All loot rooms are on cooldown. Come back in an hour.

cave-reset.text: Cave reset. Stage 1: find the exit.

journal-frag-00.text: A page torn from someone else's journal: 'Day three. The drips here have a rhythm. I think I'm starting to hear it.'

journal-frag-01.text: A bootprint, not yours. Older. Pointing the way you came.

journal-frag-02.text: Someone scratched a tally into the wall: forty-seven marks.

journal-frag-03.text: A forgotten torch. The handle is still warm.

journal-frag-04.text: A folded map, useless to you â pencil lines in directions you don't recognize.

journal-frag-05.text: An old steel cup. Half-full of cold, clear water.

journal-frag-06.text: Tin cans, neatly stacked, dusted with silt. Someone camped here.

journal-frag-07.text: A name carved into stone: HANNA. The year reads nineteen seventy-two.

journal-frag-08.text: A small bone, smaller than your finger. Bird, you think.

journal-frag-09.text: A coin from no country you recognize.

journal-frag-10.text: A stone, polished smooth by hands.

journal-frag-11.text: A page reads: 'I keep finding the same chamber. I don't think I am lost.'

journal-frag-12.text: Three glass marbles in a small pile.

journal-frag-13.text: A photograph, faded almost white. Two figures at a cave mouth.

journal-frag-15.text: A coil of rope. Uncut. Whoever left it didn't need it back.

journal-frag-16.text: A piece of chalk. The wall behind you has a small arrow on it that you don't remember drawing.

journal-frag-17.text: Words scratched in the stone, in a language you can't read.

journal-frag-18.text: An empty notebook. The first page reads, 'For whoever finds this.'

journal-frag-19.text: A child's wooden boat. The paint mostly worn off.

journal-frag-20.text: A bone whistle. It still works.

journal-frag-21.text: A page in someone else's hand: 'I think the cave is dreaming. So am I.'

journal-frag-22.text: A sealed envelope, addressed to no one.

journal-frag-23.text: A lock of hair, tied with thread.

journal-frag-24.text: Two stones, identical, one warm and one cold. You can't tell which is which after a moment.

journal-frag-25.text: A brass key, no lock to be seen.

journal-frag-26.text: A photograph of an empty room.

journal-frag-27.text: An apple, perfectly preserved. You don't eat it.

journal-frag-28.text: A toy soldier, pointing at something only it can see.

journal-frag-29.text: Sheet music, wordless. The notes form a tune you almost recognize.

journal-frag-30.text: A small gold ring, sized for a finger smaller than yours.

journal-frag-31.text: An ice ax, the head dulled from use.

journal-frag-33.text: A glass eye. You leave it where you found it.

intro-walk.text: You walk toward the cave mouth.

intro-wind.text: The wind shifts as you step inside.

listening-stay.text: Listening. Stay still to hear more.

teleport-home.text: Teleport. You're at base. Items secured.

size-deep-2.text: The ceiling is high above you.

echo-stone-placed.text: Echo stone placed. Listen for it from nearby rooms.

listen-for-it.text: Listen for it from nearby rooms.

cave-map-open.text: Cave map open. Drag the menu to read paths aloud or print as braille.

drag-menu-paths.text: Drag the menu to read paths aloud or print as braille.

braille-export-open.text: Braille export open. Tap Copy to copy the cave guide to your clipboard.

tap-copy-clipboard.text: Tap Copy to copy the cave guide to your clipboard.

welcome-tap-msg.text: Tap anywhere to enter the cave.

welcome-greeting-full.text: Welcome to Echo Cave. Tap anywhere to enter.

tutorial-first-cave.text: Your first cave is one straight path.

tutorial-listen.text: Listen to each doorway, follow it forward, reach the exit.

tutorial-once-you-do.text: Once you do, the cave opens up.

tutorial-tap-begin.text: Tap Begin to play, or Audio-only mode.

tutorial-menu-hold.text: To open the menu, double-tap and hold.

tutorial-part-1.text: In the dark. Your first cave is one straight path. Side passages are sealed. Listen to each doorway, follow it forward, reach the exit.

tutorial-part-2.text: Once you do, the cave opens up. To teleport home, tap with both fingers. To open the menu, double-tap and hold. Tap Begin to play, or Audio-only mode.

tutorial-teleport-v3.text: To teleport home, tap with both fingers, please.

inv-tap-use.text: Tap Use buttons or use the gesture menu.

help-intro.text: Help. Press slash any time to return here. Press M for the cave map, J for the journal, R to read your location.

help-slash-hint.text: Press slash any time to return here.

help-shortcuts-summary.text: Press M for the cave map, J for the journal, R to read your location.

base-stage1-prefix.text: You're at base. Stage 1: follow the main vein to find the exit.

base-stage2-prefix.text: You're at base. Stage 2: explore freely.

base-tail-stage1-1.text: 1 passage from here. Swipe to move, tap to listen.

base-tail-stage1-2.text: 2 passage from here. Swipe to move, tap to listen.

base-tail-stage1-3.text: 3 passage from here. Swipe to move, tap to listen.

base-tail-stage1-4.text: 4 passage from here. Swipe to move, tap to listen.
